name: ai-maestro-code-auditor-agent
description: Three-phase PR review pipeline and full codebase audit pipeline for Claude Code. PR review: code correctness swarm, claim verification, skeptical external review with deduplication. Includes iterative fix loop for automated resolution. Codebase audit: file inventory, grep triage, parallel discovery swarm, verification, gap-fill, per-domain consolidation, TODO generation, and optional fix loop with verification.
